audiences.answer: Sundae turns those scattered signals into a ranked decision loop: Pulse catches what is breaking during the shift, Insights explains why margin moved, and Sundae Intelligence answers in plain English with the recommended move and evidence behind it.
audiences.pain: I have data in five different systems. I make most decisions on gut feel because pulling reports takes hours and the answer arrives after the shift is gone.

audiences.answer: Pulse shows every outlet on one screen, ranks what needs attention, routes the next move to the right owner, and lets Benchmark show whether an outlet is actually winning against peers.
audiences.pain: I manage 15 outlets and can't be everywhere. I only find out about problems in the weekly P&L.

audiences.answer: Pulse AI Coach turns live shift signals into coaching prompts, Playbooks route the response, and Scorecard measures whether the manager recovered the shift.
audiences.pain: Our best managers recover slow shifts. Our worst managers watch them happen.

audiences.answer: Insights explains the prime-cost and revenue-assurance drivers behind the P&L, flags voids, discounts, food-cost variance, and labor waste early, and Benchmark shows whether the portfolio is improving against comparable peers.
audiences.pain: I spend 3 days assembling monthly reports from different systems to understand what happened.

audiences.answer: Decision Intelligence platform - not a point solution. Spans 12 data domains across 6 intelligence layers with 17 Pulse sub-pages, 12 Insights modules, 7 Benchmark sections, 3 Watchtower sections. AI layer with 15 routes and conversational data access. Network-effect benchmarking. 458 data models, 420 services. No competitor plays in Decision Intelligence for restaurants.
audiences.pain: How is this different from Toast Analytics or Restaurant365?

audiences.answer: Report Lite starts at $0 with performance reports, 250 AI credits base (plus 80 per location), and document ingestion. Report Plus at $79/mo adds multi-location and 3 AI seats. Add only the modules you need - Guest Experience starts at $149/mo + $14/location, Revenue Assurance at $149/mo + $14/location, and Crew Lite starts at $99/mo + $19/location for workforce-first teams.
audiences.pain: I can't afford an enterprise system but I need more than my POS dashboard gives me.

gaps: Delivery/cloud kitchen focused only - no dine-in intelligence

differentiators.description: Only Decision Intelligence platform spanning 12 data domains, 6 intelligence layers, 12 analytics modules, and conversational AI
differentiators.title: Breadth

differentiators.description: Pulse with 17 sub-pages, 8 exception evaluators, and compound detection (death spiral, leakage drag) - no competitor has same-shift intelligence
differentiators.title: Real-time

differentiators.description: Benchmark creates a data moat - every new restaurant makes benchmarks more valuable for everyone. This is the STR model that built a $450M business in hotels.
differentiators.title: Network effect

differentiators.description: Sundae Intelligence with NL-to-SQL, 10 AI chat modes, 1.1MB prompt library - democratizes data access beyond analysts
differentiators.title: Conversational AI

differentiators.description: $0 free tier to $349+ enterprise with 14 purchasable modules and 6 bundles - operators buy what they need, expand as they grow
differentiators.title: Modular pricing

differentiators.description: 6 @sundae/* SDK packages (ui, analytics, core, vertical-restaurant, partner-sdk, crew) with a VerticalConfig contract - restaurants is the founding vertical; additional verticals plug in without forking the platform. Partner-sdk is a public typed client with webhook signature verification.
differentiators.title: Multi-vertical architecture

differentiators.description: scheduling, time & attendance, HR operations, product support, Ask-HR, People Intelligence, and a provider-neutral payroll readiness/statutory export engine with GCC country-pack workflows shipped; UK, EU, US, and Canada expansion scoped/on roadmap. Every shift, hour, HR record, and pay-cycle evidence point becomes signal feeding Labor Intelligence, Pulse, Watchtower, and Foresight - a loop a standalone HR/payroll vendor cannot close.
differentiators.title: Operational substrate (Crew)
